parameters.content:
## 📊 Weekly Needle Mover Digest

**Schedule:** Every Sunday at 6:00 PM CT
**Source:** Reads North Star.md + Master Task List from MinIO
**Output:** Full HTML digest email with rock statuses, Priority A tasks, and reflection prompts

### Setup
- Credential `MinIO — obsidian-vault` must exist
- Credential `Gmail SMTP` must exist
- North Star.md must have `nm-progress-[area]::` inline fields

### Expected North Star.md Fields
```
[nm-progress-faith:: 35%]
[nm-progress-family:: 0%]
[nm-progress-business:: 25%]
[nm-progress-work:: 0%]
[nm-progress-health:: 0%]
```

### Test
Run manually any time to preview the email.

parameters.fileKey: Homelab/10_Active Projects/Active Personal/!!! MASTER TASK LIST.md
